mapper.select: SELECT * FROM content_tags WHERE tag_name = #{tagName} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM content_tags WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY use_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM content_tags WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY use_count DESC
SELECT * FROM content_tags WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM content_tags WHERE tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%') AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY use_count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE content_tags SET use_count = use_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{tagId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE content_tags SET use_count = CASE WHEN use_count > 0 THEN use_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{tagId} AND del_flag = 0

UPDATE content_tags SET use_count = use_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE del_flag = 0 AND id IN
#{tagId}

UPDATE content_tags SET use_count = CASE WHEN use_count > 0 THEN use_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE del_flag = 0 AND id IN
#{tagId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM content_tags WHERE use_count = 0 AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_tags WHERE del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_tags WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND del_flag = 0
